claim.statement: Form fields should surface the most appropriate mobile keyboard by setting the correct input type and inputmode (e.g. type=email for email, type=tel for phone, inputmode=numeric/decimal for numeric entry), so users get the right keys without extra switching.

limitations: Exact keyboard rendering for inputmode differs between iOS and Android

do: Use type=email, type=tel, type=url where semantically correct
Use inputmode=numeric or inputmode=decimal for numeric entry instead of type=number
Pair with autocomplete tokens for faster, less error-prone entry
avoid: Defaulting every field to a plain text keyboard
Using type=number for identifiers like phone numbers or codes
